task: Write a Python function that validates if a given string is a valid AWS S3 bucket name according to AWS naming rules (3-63 characters, lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only, must start and end with letter or number)
Create a JSON object that represents an AWS IAM policy allowing read-only access to a specific S3 bucket with ARN 'arn:aws:s3:::my-bucket/*'
Write a regex pattern that matches valid AWS EC2 instance IDs (format: i- followed by 8 or 17 hexadecimal characters)
